misc: Adopted a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season
biography: Simo, representing Hirsala Golf, has long been a formidable and recognizable presence within the challenging arena of the Hector Trophée. His enduring commitment to this distinctive pairs competition is exemplified by his upcoming participation in the Hector Trophée 2026, which will mark his eleventh appearance in the esteemed event.

Over his decade of involvement, Simo has showcased a remarkable aptitude for the team format, steering his partnerships to victory and claiming the coveted Hector Trophée on three separate occasions. These triumphs underscore his strategic acumen and his ability to synergize with a partner under pressure. While the individual Victor Trophy has yet to be added to his illustrious record, his consistent performance in the pair competition firmly establishes him as a crucial element in the tournament's history.

Known for his exceptionally passionate approach to the game, which on occasion manifests in a colorful vocabulary on the course, Simo channels an intense focus into every shot. This dedication extends to his equipment, as evidenced by his adoption of a L.A.B. Golf zero torque putter for the 2025 season—a meticulous quest for marginal gains and optimal performance on the greens. This blend of fiery determination and calculated technical refinement makes him a fascinating figure to observe.

As Simo prepares for his eleventh campaign, the golfing community anticipates another compelling display from this veteran competitor. His ongoing pursuit of excellence, both individually and within the pair format, ensures his continued relevance and excitement in the unfolding narrative of the Hector Trophée.
